figures.caption: Figure 3: Training curves and ablation overview. (a) Training curves of EVALACT with 3B/7B backbones. (b) Model ablation across training variants. (c) Method ablation on removing the evaluation loop or PCAR. (d) Sensitivity to PCAR rescaling intensity.
Table 1: Main results (EM, %) on seven open-domain QA benchmarks. Bold and underlined values indicate the best and second-best performance, respectively.
Figure 2: Effect of SFT on Format Alignment. The Base model exhibits high tool parsing failure rates.
Figure 1: Overview of EVALACT with PCAR. The agent follows a coupled Search→Evaluate protocol, producing segment-wise self-evaluation scores {zi,k} that PCAR uses to rescale GRPO advantages.
